lobe.name: Svrn7.Identity
lobe.title: SVRN7 Identity LOBE
lobe.description: DID Document and Verifiable Credential resolution via DIDComm. Handles inbound did/1.0/resolve-request and vc/1.0/resolve-by-subject-request messages. Delegates to ISvrn7SocietyDriver for local resolution and FederationDidDocumentResolver / FederationVcDocumentResolver for cross-Society resolution.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: DID Resolve Request
protocols.description: Inbound DID Document resolution request from a peer TDA. Body: { from, did }

protocols.title: VC Resolution
protocols.description: Inbound VC resolution request by subject DID. Body: { from, subjectDid }

cmdlets.name: Resolve-Svrn7Did
cmdlets.title: Resolve DID Document
cmdlets.description: Resolves a DID Document for a requested DID and returns a did/1.0/resolve-response. Handles both local and cross-Society resolution transparently.

cmdlets.name: Get-Svrn7VcById
cmdlets.title: Get VCs by Subject
cmdlets.description: Resolves all active Verifiable Credentials for a subject DID and returns a vc/1.0/resolve-by-subject-response.

cmdlets.name: Resolve-Svrn7CitizenIdentity
cmdlets.title: Resolve Full Citizen Identity
cmdlets.description: Local convenience function returning DID Document + all active VCs for a citizen DID. Used by other LOBEs needing full identity context. Does not produce a DIDComm response.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0.
ai.summary: Handles all DIDComm-based identity resolution: DID Documents (did/1.0/*) and Verifiable Credentials (vc/1.0/*). Transparent local/cross-Society routing via ISvrn7SocietyDriver.
useCases: Responding to cross-Society DID Document resolution requests
Providing VC fan-out results to peer Societies
Full citizen identity resolution for other LOBEs before sensitive operations
compositionHints: Resolve-Svrn7CitizenIdentity is a local utility — use it in Onboarding/Invoicing pipelines before acting on a citizen DID
Resolve-Svrn7Did handles the full did/1.0/resolve-request → response pipeline including cross-Society routing
Depends on Svrn7.Society (Find-Svrn7VcsBySubject) — ensure Society is loaded first
limitations: Epoch 0: DID Document resolution only via ISvrn7SocietyDriver. Full DID resolver chain (chain of trust) is future epoch.
VC fan-out returns only active (non-revoked) credentials.
